prompts.name: 豪华电动车展厅
prompts.prompt: Goal: Premium automotive brand image, futuristic and elegant. Asset: Campaign hero for luxury EV launch. Scene: Nighttime architectural showroom, polished concrete, glass walls. Subject: Luxury EV, side-three-quarter profile. Composition: Wide cinematic, vehicle dominant. Lighting: Architectural night lighting, body highlights. Materials: Metallic paint, brushed aluminum. Constraints: No logo, no people, no watermark.

prompts.name: 高端护肤品主视觉
prompts.prompt: Goal: Premium skincare hero, expensive and conversion-ready. Asset: E-commerce hero for serum launch. Scene: Warm ivory studio, travertine pedestal, water ripples. Subject: Frosted glass serum bottle, champagne cap. Composition: Centered, low angle, negative space for overlay. Lighting: Soft diffused studio light. Materials: Frosted glass, polished stone. Constraints: No logo, no text, no hands.
